questionHtml: What information about 2-hydroxybutanoic acid can be inferred through mass spectrometry, MS, infrared spectroscopy, IR, and proton nuclear magnetic resonance spectroscopy, 1H NMR?

meta.title: What information about 2-hydroxybutanoic acid can be inferred through mass spectrometry, MS, infrared spectroscopy, IR, and proton nuclear magnetic resonance spectroscopy, 1H NMR?
